sourceAmbiguity: Signed-in request creation could be misread as a separate logged-in form stack.
decisionTaken: Signed-in actions route into /start-request/:draft/... and publish secondAuthenticatedIntakeModelForbidden.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: The shared contract requires one canonical intake model for anonymous, signed-in, and continuation entries.
operationalRisk: Future account-specific polish could accidentally fork question semantics.
